attempts.reflection: You repeated the action of mining cobblestone three times without obtaining a necessary tool, the wooden pickaxe. Additionally, you tried to craft the wooden pickaxe before having the required materials (sticks and oak planks). To fix this, first craft a crafting table using oak planks, then use the crafting table to make a wooden pickaxe by gathering sticks and oak planks. Finally, use the pickaxe to mine cobblestone and proceed with crafting the bucket.

attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft a wooden bucket without having the necessary ingredients. Specifically, you lacked oak logs to make the sticks needed for the bucket. Additionally, you attempted to craft the bucket multiple times without ensuring you had the required materials. To fix this, first, craft sticks from oak planks, then use those sticks along with a bucket recipe to create the wooden bucket. Ensure you have at least 4 oak planks before attempting to craft the bucket.
